reviews.review_description:
Has the makings of a good game but there are no options to change controller settings. I would like to decrease turn rate or make it smoother to make it less "chunky".

 I'd also like the option of a limited boost. All tracks now released and available because of immediate reply from DEVS. 

Great dev support, game deserves backing. I think it could be a good fun game with options and I will change my review accordingly. Nearly a 4* and deffo will be with little tweak.
Thank you.
